servers.description:
v1 Dataset (Open Source)
• Public & open license
• Code and metadata available on GitHub
• GIF-based media
• Ideal for demos, personal apps, and learning
• chat support for full dataset access

get.description: Search exercises using fuzzy matching across all fields (name, muscles, equipment, body parts). Perfect for when users don't know exact terms.

schema.description: The number of exercises to skip from the start of the list. Useful for pagination to fetch subsequent pages of results.
schema.title: Offset

schema.description: The maximum number of exercises to return in the response. Limits the number of results for pagination purposes.
schema.title: Limit

schema.description: Search term that will be fuzzy matched against exercise names, muscles, equipment, and body parts
schema.title: Search Query

schema.description: Fuzzy search threshold (0 = exact match, 1 = very loose match)
schema.title: Search Threshold

200.description: Successful response with fuzzy search results

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

totalExercises.description: Total number of exercises matching the criteria

previousPage.description: URL for the previous page, null if on first page

nextPage.description: URL for the next page, null if on last page

get.summary: Get all exercises with optional search
get.description: Retrieve all exercises with optional fuzzy search filtering

schema.description: The number of exercises to skip from the start of the list. Useful for pagination to fetch subsequent pages of results.
schema.title: Offset

schema.description: The maximum number of exercises to return in the response. Limits the number of results for pagination purposes.
schema.title: Limit

schema.description: Optional search term for fuzzy matching across all exercise fields
schema.title: Search Query

schema.description: Field to sort exercises by
schema.title: Sort Field

schema.description: Sort order (ascending or descending)
schema.title: Sort Order

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

totalExercises.description: Total number of exercises matching the criteria

previousPage.description: URL for the previous page, null if on first page

nextPage.description: URL for the next page, null if on last page

get.description: Advance Filter exercises by multiple criteria with fuzzy search support

schema.description: The number of exercises to skip from the start of the list. Useful for pagination to fetch subsequent pages of results.
schema.title: Offset

schema.description: The maximum number of exercises to return in the response. Limits the number of results for pagination purposes.
schema.title: Limit

schema.description: Fuzzy search across all fields
schema.title: Search Query

schema.description: Comma-separated list of target muscles
schema.title: Target Muscles

schema.description: Comma-separated list of equipment
schema.title: Equipment

schema.description: Comma-separated list of body parts
schema.title: Body Parts

schema.description: Field to sort by
schema.title: Sort Field

schema.description: Sort order
schema.title: Sort Order

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

totalExercises.description: Total number of exercises matching the criteria

previousPage.description: URL for the previous page, null if on first page

nextPage.description: URL for the next page, null if on last page

schema.description: The unique identifier of the exercise to retrieve.
schema.title: Exercise ID

200.description: Successful response with the exercise details.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

get.description: Retrieve exercises that target a specific body part

schema.description: Body part name (case-insensitive)
The number of exercises to skip from the start of the list. Useful for pagination to fetch subsequent pages of results.
schema.title: Offset

schema.description: The maximum number of exercises to return in the response. Limits the number of results for pagination purposes.
schema.title: Limit

200.description: Successful response with body part-specific exercises

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

totalExercises.description: Total number of exercises matching the criteria

previousPage.description: URL for the previous page, null if on first page

nextPage.description: URL for the next page, null if on last page

get.description: Retrieve exercises that use specific equipment

schema.description: Equipment name (case-insensitive)
The number of exercises to skip from the start of the list. Useful for pagination to fetch subsequent pages of results.
schema.title: Offset

schema.description: The maximum number of exercises to return in the response. Limits the number of results for pagination purposes.
schema.title: Limit

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

totalExercises.description: Total number of exercises matching the criteria

previousPage.description: URL for the previous page, null if on first page

nextPage.description: URL for the next page, null if on last page

get.description: Retrieve exercises that target a specific muscle

schema.description: Target muscle name (case-insensitive)
The number of exercises to skip from the start of the list. Useful for pagination to fetch subsequent pages of results.
schema.title: Offset

schema.description: The maximum number of exercises to return in the response. Limits the number of results for pagination purposes.
schema.title: Limit

schema.description: Whether to include exercises where this muscle is a secondary target
schema.title: Include Secondary Muscles

200.description: Successful response with the exercise details.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

totalExercises.description: Total number of exercises matching the criteria

previousPage.description: URL for the previous page, null if on first page

nextPage.description: URL for the next page, null if on last page

200.description: Successful response with list of all muscles.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

200.description: Successful response with list of all equipments.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful

200.description: Successful response with list of all bodyparts.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful
